meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup (Advanced Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client projects. Master Claude Code and Antigravity to ship faster with this advanced workflow checklist for professional AI builders.
content.answer_block: To stop stalling, you must offload cognitive friction to Claude Code. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you create a feedback loop that forces completion. This setup automates the 'blank page' phase, ensuring your logic remains sound while execution speed accelerates by 10x.
content.intro:
The graveyard of unfinished SaaS projects is paved with good intentions and broken momentum. As a freelancer, your greatest enemy isn't lack of skill—it's the 'feature creep' and implementation paralysis that happens when you spend more time architecting than shipping. You feel the weight of a half-finished dashboard, and your client feels the delay.

Relief arrives when you stop writing code line-by-line and start orchestrating AI agents to execute your vision. By leveraging Claude Code’s command-line autonomy alongside Antigravity’s structural precision, you transform from a struggling coder into a high-velocity architect. It is time to replace manual toil with systematic, AI-driven deployment.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the scope and data schema within Antigravity to prevent scope creep before the first line of code is written.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular project architecture for a [SaaS Type] including database schema (PostgreSQL), API endpoints, and a frontend structure using Next.js 14 and Tailwind.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create project structure based on the provided Antigravity schema'

steps.title: Environment Synchronization
steps.description: Configure the agent to understand your specific environment constraints and project dependencies to avoid hallucinated imports.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an environment configuration file for this project, listing all necessary dependencies and environment variables for production-grade security.

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break complex features into atomic tasks and let Claude Code execute them one by one to maintain high code quality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break down the 'User Authentication' feature into 5 granular tasks with clear acceptance criteria for each.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement authentication using NextAuth.js following the atomic task list'

steps.title: Automated Testing & QA
steps.description: Ensure your code works out of the box by forcing the agent to write and run tests before finalizing any module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests for the new API endpoints generated in step 3 using Playwright.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'write and execute integration tests; fix any failing tests until 100% pass rate'

steps.title: Refactoring for Performance
steps.description: Perform a final architectural sweep to clean up technical debt and optimize component reusability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest refactoring patterns for better maintainability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply suggested refactoring for performance optimization'

pro_tips: Always force Claude Code to generate a 'plan.md' file before it starts writing code to ensure alignment with your vision.
Use Antigravity to maintain a 'Context Map' that you feed into Claude Code session headers to prevent context window drift.
Never accept code without asking for a summary of changes; this forces the AI to explain its logic and reveals potential errors.
Alias your most frequent Claude Code commands in your shell profile to turn multi-step workflows into single-word triggers.
When stuck, instruct Claude Code to 'Act as a Senior Staff Engineer' to force a more defensive and robust coding style.
content.next_steps: Once your first module is live, implement a daily 'Agent Sync' where you review the code Claude generated and document lessons learned back into your Antigravity project repository for future reuse.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting unfinished projects drain your bank account and your confidence. By mastering the agentic workflow, you reclaim your time and finish projects with professional-grade precision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
